title: Arda's Ores
description:
Arda's Ores mod is a mod that adds many ores, armor, items and features to the game.
You can make stronger armor and items with the materials you dig, and you can use these armor and items to be stronger against the creatures you encounter.
body:
![Arda's Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1bbc39cde4014e03bc7586211be242e7ca494e.png)
### **What does the mod add?**

💚Arda's Ores mod is a mod that adds many ores, armor,items and features to the game.💚

![Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23305a80f5ceba868b9f81859f4592ed6d24180.png)

### **Features**
🟢+16 Ore (More will be added soon.)

🟢Gems with special powers. 

🟢This mod contributes to your faster progress in the game thanks to the many gems it adds to the game.


🟢Most of these ores are found in the world, nether, and end.

🟢The mod was released too early. There may be many errors and omissions.

![Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23305a80f5ceba868b9f81859f4592ed6d24180.png)

### **Gems from the mod**
- Sahpphire
- Ruby
- Uranium
- Silver
- Topaz
- Ixranium
- Tin
- Bronze
- Aluminum
- Onyx
- Lead
- ExpDiamond
- Charged Onyx
- Charged Netherite
- Charged Copper
- Peridot

![Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23305a80f5ceba868b9f81859f4592ed6d24180.png)

### **Requirements**
- NeoForge
- 1.21.1

![Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23305a80f5ceba868b9f81859f4592ed6d24180.png)

### **Charges**
When ores combine with each other, they create stronger and more durable ores.

![Charges](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0721dca055f20cd704e5b4c6a8f5cc3c6b027b5c.png)
